description: Configure the system-wide default dashboard for all users. Login as admin (admin / Admin1234!). Remove the 'Online users' block, add a 'Timeline' block to the central content region, and add a 'Text' block to the side region with the title 'Student Support' and content 'For technical assistance, please contact helpdesk@university.edu or call 555-0199.' Ensure the updated dashboard is reset for all existing users to apply the changes.
